title: Handling Exceptions with Multiple Catch Clauses
description: A flowchart depicting the control flow when a try block is followed by multiple catch blocks to handle different types of exceptions.
relationships: Try Block -> Catch Block (ArithmeticException) if ArithmeticException occurs
Try Block -> Catch Block (NullPointerException) if NullPointerException occurs
Try Block -> Catch Block (Exception) if any other Exception occurs
Any executed Catch Block -> Finally Block
Try Block -> Finally Block if no exception occurs
